en: Hi. Company. Sorry, didn't call ahead.
This is an agent of some kind. Gentleman? This is Laura.
I know all your names. Oh, incoming.
Hi, sweetheart. Hey, buddy. How you guys doing?
These are... Look at your face. ...smaller agents. Oh, my goodness.
ko: 네 얼굴 좀 봐. 오, 세상에.

en: Did you bring any nuts? Why don't you hug her and find out?
Sorry for barging in on you. Yeah, we would have called ahead, but we were busy having no idea that you existed.
Yeah, well, Fury helped me set this up when I joined.
ko: 그래, 퓨리가 내가 합류할 때 이걸 설정해줬어.

en: Kept it off Shield's files, like to keep it that way.
ko: 쉴드의 파일에는 남기지 않았어, 그렇게 유지하고 싶어.

en: I figure it's a good place to lay low. Honey.
ko: 여기서 숨어 지내기 좋은 곳이라고 생각해.

en: Oh, I missed you. How's little Natasha, huh?
